_publications._publicationTitle: Multiscale, converging defects of macro-porosity, microstructure and matrix mineralization impact long bone fragility in NF1.

_contextSnippet: However, in Nf1Col1 mice the acoustic impedance was unaffected (average Z of all ROI: ctrl = 5.92±0.69 MRayl; Nf1Col1 = 5.90±0.73 MRayl)
details: Acoustic impedance was unaffected (average Z of all ROI: ctrl = 5.92±0.69 MRayl; Nf1Col1 = 5.90±0.73 MRayl)
